skill-items: JavaScript (ES5, ES6):</br> DOM manipulation, Fetch API

employments.title: Data Engineer
highlights: Onboarded new customer by coordinating with client IT staff to set up automated raw data extraction and scripting ETL pipeline in Airflow

Shortened customer onboarding timeline from 12 to 4 weeks by designing, implementing, and maintaining web app module that allowed client IT staff to independently verify raw data schema and data extraction script and reduced manual email exchanges between client IT and product managers

Reduced data error incidents and increased deployment confidence by provisioning sandboxed environment that mirrored production infrastructure/configuration and enabled developers to perform end-to-end testing of ETL logic for individual git branches
Automated unit testing by integrating pytest into Jenkins deployment job
Increased production Airflow availability and reliability by introducing DataDog for monitoring outage, notifying on-call engineers, and identifying abnormal performance slowdown
Experimented with fault-injection testing on production Airflow and trained teammates on responding to production outage through simulated Airflow failures
Reverse engineered EHR business metric logic with zero visibility into backend code base

projects.title: Chives exchange
highlights: Designed and implemented horizontally-scalable matching engine that can run in a cluster to increase performance and reliability
Used Flask to provide web GUI where users can create company, trade stocks, and even view stock charts
Deployed containerized services to AWS EC2 behind NginX reverse proxy for increased security and web performance
Route network traffic through personal domain using AWS Route 53

projects.title: PyArchive
highlights: Designed and implemented hybrid file backup solution resilient against network failure
Experimented with WebSocket for script execution from web with real-time output

projects.title: InquireUSCIS
highlights: Scripted multithreaded headless Chrome sessions for querying large number of USCIS applications' status

projects.title: Simple resume generator
highlights: Scripted JavaScipt app that renders pre-templated resume from remote JSON object
Rendered the resume you are reading right now
